sentence: Feed a man claviar long enough; he stops recognizing his own womberang.

wombos.definition: A wombo you coined that gets repeated back to you later by someone else in conversation — it boomerangs. The experience of hearing your own word come back around.
Caviar-grade luxury served at a clavicular table — the food a brooksmaxxer eats off his own collarbones. Pinkie-out cuisine.
wombos.example: Looksmaxxed hors d'oeuvres, a side of claviar, and not a single carb in sight.
